name: Tally Form Builder API
what_it_does: Notion-inspired form builder with REST API offering unlimited free forms, complex logic, and embeddable widgets — providing a clean, free alternative to Typeform with webhook integration for form submission processing.
use_cases: Retrieving form submissions programmatically for CRM or database integration
Building lead capture forms with webhook delivery to agent processing pipelines
Creating structured data collection workflows with complex conditional logic
Embedding forms in websites with webhook submission processing by agents
Survey and feedback collection with automated response analysis via API
not_for: Enterprise survey platforms with advanced analytics (use Qualtrics or SurveyMonkey)
Complex multi-step workflows beyond form collection
Teams needing form-to-payment integration without third-party setup
best_when: A team needs unlimited, free forms with clean UX and webhook delivery for agent processing, without paying per-response fees.
avoid_when: You need enterprise survey features, complex analytics, or native payment collection.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for app integrations. Personal API key for direct access. Bearer token authentication. Webhook configuration for submission delivery. Scoped access per form via OAuth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: unlimited forms, unlimited responses — extremely generous
pricing.notes: Free tier is genuinely unlimited for forms and responses. Paid plans add custom domains, remove branding, and unlock advanced features. Bootstrapped. Excellent value. Strong Notion-inspired UX.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply; not prominently documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for reading form submissions. Webhook support for real-time submission delivery. OAuth2 for app integrations. API documentation less comprehensive than enterprise tools. Good for webhook-based workflows.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Form submission reads are idempotent. Webhooks may retry on failure — implement deduplication on submission ID. Read operations always return consistent results.
known_agent_gotchas: Form creation and management primarily through UI — limited API for form setup
Webhook retry behavior on delivery failure — implement idempotent processing
Rate limits not clearly documented — implement conservative backoff
EU data residency only — US-only compliance requirements may be a concern

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with scopes. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Belgian company with strong European privacy culture. Form submissions contain user data — handle with care.
